description:
This quiz assesses proficiency in fundamental data structures such as stacks, lists, and trees, as well as core algorithmic concepts and time‑complexity analysis. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a balanced mix of recall and application questions. The tone is instructional and supportive, guiding learners through the material while reinforcing key concepts.
Topics: Stacks, Lists, Trees, Algorithm fundamentals, Time complexity, Big O notation
Audience: Students and early‑career developers preparing for technical interviews or coursework in data structures and algorithms.
